channel.title: Politics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Politics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Judge holds DHS officials in contempt, orders compensation to Mexican national released in winter storm
item.description: A federal judge held government officials in contempt for violating a court order protecting immigration detainee Fernando Gutierrez Torres from trans...

item.title: Erika Kirk to be Trump's guest at State of the Union
item.description: Erika Kirk, widow of assassinated Turning Point USA founder Charlie Kirk, will attend President Donald Trump's State of the Union as his special guest...

US, France move to steady ties after Paris restricts ambassador's access
item.description: U.S. and France are working to repair a diplomatic crisis after U.S. Ambassador Charles Kushner's access was restricted over social media posts about ...

item.title: Rebel GOP Senate candidate enters lion's den for Trump's State of the Union
item.description: Political drama unfolds as Texas GOP rivals Ken Paxton and Sen. John Cornyn, R-Texas, both seek President Donald Trump's endorsement in their contenti...

item.title: Don't Miss Our MASSIVE State of the Union VIP Sale

item.description: Rubio and the CIA chief will brief Congress o tensions with Iran just hours before Trump's State of the Union address as nuclear talks resume Thursday...
